bibliography:
Brealey, R., Myers, S., Allen, F, & Edmans, A. (2023). Principles of Corporate Finance 14e, MCGraw Hill. ISBN 978-1265074159

Brealey, R., Myers, S., & Allen, F. (2018). Princípios de Finanças Corporativas, MCGraw Hill. ISBN 978-8580556100. Tradução (Português do Brasil) de BREALEY, R., Myers, S., Allen, F. (2016).

Principles of Corporate Finance 12e, MCGraw Hill.
methodology:
The following teaching methodologies (TM) will be used:

TM1 - Expositional: presentation of the concepts and techniques related to the syllabus contents

TM2 - Participative: analysis and resolution of cases

TM3 - Self-study: utonomous work by the student
objectives:
LO1 - Define the main concepts and scope of corporate finance.

LO2 - Evaluate bonds and common stocks.

LO3 - Prepare the elements and apply suitable techniques for investment decisions.

LO4 - Understand the concepts of risk, return, and cost of capital; Explain the portfolio theory and the Capital Asset Pricing Model; Select and apply suitable techniques for risk analysis.

LO5 - Explain the main theories of capital structure; Compute the WACC (Weighted-Average Cost of Capital).

LO6 - Prepare the elements and apply suitable techniques for valuing businesses and companies.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
S1 - Introduction to investment analysis

S2 - Valuing bonds and common stocks

S3 - Making investment decisions.

S4 - Risk analysis

S5 - Capital structure and company financing

S6 - Financing and valuation
presentation: The main objective of this course is to introduce students to the fundamental concepts of corporate finance
